## Summary
Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / experiment
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Test addition

## Checklist
- [ ] All CI checks pass (`make lint && make test`)
- [ ] Smoke test passes (`make test-smoke`)
- [ ] Theorem 1 verification passes if governance code was changed (`make verify-theorem1`)
- [ ] Test coverage has not decreased
- [ ] New public functions have Google-style docstrings
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] If experiment results changed: `results/paper/` CSVs updated

## Paper Impact
Does this PR affect any claimed results?
- [ ] No — internal refactor / documentation only
- [ ] Yes — describe which table/figure is affected and by how much
